data.body:
Release prep on worktree release-0.10.1 (branched from origin/main @ ed8c747e8):
- Version bump: pyproject.toml 0.10.0->0.10.1; server.json top-level + packages[0] -> 0.10.1. Lockstep verified: grep -c '0.10.1' pyproject.toml=1, server.json=2, no lingering 0.10.0.
- CHANGELOG.md: generated [0.10.1] via 'make changelog VERSION=v0.10.1', hand-curated into Added/Changed/Fixed/Ops (maintenance release framing); fixed stale footer ([unreleased] was pinned at v0.8.0) and backfilled 0.9.0/0.9.1/0.10.0/0.10.1 compare-links.
- Local gates GREEN: make lint (ruff+format+zizmor+actionlint+DCO), make typecheck (mypy, 379 files clean), python -m build (nava_rebar-0.10.1 wheel+sdist), 'twine check dist/*' PASSED on both artifacts.
- make test running.
